reviews.review_description: This is the first game that I've purchased that I did not like. I thought it was going to be somewhat like an actual racing game, but it is only a slot car racing game. There's no turning and I'm not even sure that there's breaking, and simply push the accelerator and everything, not to mention that he game was extremely jumpy and glitchy.

I picked up Spinout Racer recently and I am honestly surprised by how much fun it is. At first I thought it would be just another VR racing game, but the crazy tracks completely change the experience.

The first one feels pretty normal, racing in the office, but then you are suddenly weaving between dinosaurs or drifting across rooftops with a huge city skyline below you. The kids room track is hilarious, you are tiny compared to the giant teddy bear and toys around you.

developer_response.body: We are glad you like our game, thank you. Team Alternative
